response.overview: The heroine of the film visits her friend in a mansion on the Baltic Sea. However, nothing can displace the artist Shuvalov, the man she loves, from Elena's heart. The vacation ends and everyday life begins, the hustle and bustle of movie life. Shuvalov dies on the set of the film. Elena can't get out of the impasse of life either...
response.title: Лабиринт любви
